docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MAKKONNEN, TEKLE FOGGY, JOAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAKKONNEN, TEKLE FOGGY, JOAN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-20-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP V MAKKONNEN, TEKLE ET AL C/C FOR TRIAL PLTF APPEARED W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF, DEFT. MAKKONNEN, TEKLE AND FOGGY, JOAN APPEARED IN PRO PER PLTF WITNESS TINA DIRIENTO SWORN AND EXAMINED BY BOTH SIDES PLTF EXH #1 LEASE AGREEMENT IN EVIDENCE, PLTF. EXH #2 3-DAY NOTICE IN EVIDENCE. DEFT. JOAN FOGGY SWORN AND TESTIFIED IN THE NARRATIVE. DEFT #A (LETTER DATED 4/19/94) OFFERED FOR I.D NOT ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. DEFENSE OFFERED REBUTTAL TESTIMONY. ALL EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY COURT, CT TO PREPARE JUDGE- MENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAKKONNEN, TEKLE FOGGY, JOAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 615 JOHN MUIR DR. #719 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,904.20 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,354.20, LEASE FORFEITED
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: ROSSOFF, MICHAEL SHERWOOD ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAKKONNEN, TEKLE FOGGY, JOAN
HEARING ON THIRD PARTY CLAIM, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BATISTE, WILMA HEARING SET FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON THIRD PARTY CLAIM, CALENDAR OF AUG-01-1994, DENIED CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION DENIED AS TO WILMA BATISTE PER JUDGE QUIDACHAY
WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR REAL PROPERTY, ISSUED ON APR/26/94 RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF OFFICE
